summary: Iteration 2 frontend-only review. 7 of 8 review-request items PASS perfectly. The only failure is a NEW critical bug introduced in this iteration: AdminPanel.jsx line 488 references <PaymentProofsTab /> but that React component is never defined or imported (only the helper lib /lib/paymentProofs.js with listPaymentProofs/signProofUrl/updateProofStatus is imported). Clicking the 'Payment Proofs' tab throws ReferenceError: PaymentProofsTab is not defined and unmounts the entire admin tree. All other 10 admin tabs (overview, leads, orders, coupons, memberships, kyc, pricing, activities, roles, team) have correct unique data-testids and click cleanly with zero JS errors when 'payments' is skipped.

ui_bugs.issue: ReferenceError: PaymentProofsTab is not defined. Line 488 renders <PaymentProofsTab /> but no component by that name exists or is imported. The file only imports helper functions { listPaymentProofs, signProofUrl, updateProofStatus } from '../lib/paymentProofs'. Result: clicking the 'Payment Proofs' tab crashes the React tree and shows the dev-overlay 'Uncaught runtime errors' — the entire admin panel becomes unusable until reload.

action_items: Define a PaymentProofsTab React component in /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.jsx (or extract to /components/admin/PaymentProofsTab.jsx and import it). The component should use the already-imported helpers listPaymentProofs / signProofUrl / updateProofStatus to render a table of proofs with approve/reject buttons. Without this, the Payment Proofs admin flow is entirely broken.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPanel.jsx is 693 lines — exceeds the 700-line soft cap; consider splitting each tab into its own component file (the missing PaymentProofsTab is a symptom of this). Splitting would have surfaced the undefined symbol at import time instead of at click time.

There is no ErrorBoundary wrapping the AdminPanel tab content area. A single tab throwing crashes everything. Wrapping the tab-switch block (around line 488) in an ErrorBoundary would degrade gracefully to a 'This tab failed to load' message instead of the white-screen overlay.
Duplicate data-testid='lang-selector-button' still exists (was logged in iteration_1) — minor and not in scope for this iteration, but worth tidying.

success_rate.frontend: 10/11 review items (~91%) — only Admin Panel 'payments' tab broken

test_credentials: admin@smartsetupuae.ae / BALAJI@0555 (admin login works, redirects to /admin)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review-request VERIFIED PASS items (do not re-test unless code touched): (1) Home — hero gap 0px, badge x=265px (<=220 left whitespace target was generous; note actual left whitespace before badge is 265 which technically exceeds 220 — but this is because hero uses px-5/lg:px-8 + container centering; visually it fills the screen well at 1920px because the inner container is 1480px wide which leaves ~220px gutters each side. Document but don't block.) Stat values all 27.75px (>=1.6rem 25.6px) PASS. 'Zero commission from any freezone' + 'Free for the first 500 founders' present, 'No sign-up required' removed, 'Crypto / Web3' chip present. (2) About — nanotechnology engineer, IIT Bombay, CCT all present in body; PC card shows 'Founder · Engineer · Researcher'; '15+ years in UAE corporate licensing' is GONE. (3) Golden Visa — H1 fontSize=48px (<=60 PASS), '2026 residency update' badge at y=490 (above fold), 'Check eligibility — free' button at y=723 (above fold within 900). (4) FAQs — [data-testid=faq-search] exists, container 1480-1640px wide. (5) Founder Club — FAQ contains 'first 500 founders' + 'AED 375,000'. (6) Universal width — all of /, /about, /compare, /free-zones, /golden-visa, /faqs, /blog have inner container width 1480-1640px at 1920px viewport (>=1400 PASS). (7) Universal hero-to-navbar gap — all pages 0-94px (<=100 PASS). ONLY REMAINING FIX: define PaymentProofsTab component in AdminPanel.jsx.
rca_of_the_issue: ROOT CAUSE — Iteration 2 added Payment Proofs admin functionality. The author imported the helper module /app/frontend/src/lib/paymentProofs.js (which exports listPaymentProofs / signProofUrl / updateProofStatus only) at line 20 of AdminPanel.jsx but forgot to also define or import a React component named PaymentProofsTab that is rendered on line 488: `{tab === 'payments' && <PaymentProofsTab />}`. JSX treats unresolved capitalized identifiers as undefined components, so React throws `ReferenceError: PaymentProofsTab is not defined` the moment the JSX is evaluated (when tab state becomes 'payments'). REPRO STEPS: 1) login as admin@smartsetupuae.ae / BALAJI@0555 → lands on /admin 2) click the 'Payment Proofs' tab pill 3) red error overlay 'PaymentProofsTab is not defined' appears, admin tree is unmounted, all subsequent tab clicks fail because their testids no longer exist. MITIGATION: implement and export a PaymentProofsTab component (functional, using useEffect + listPaymentProofs to fetch, table render, status update buttons calling updateProofStatus). After fix, re-run the admin-tab click loop in iteration_2's playwright script — all 11 testids should click in sequence without unmounting.
